ItacPersonItem.Notes: Corrector of the second and third edition of Vannoccio Biringucci`s Pirotechnia. See Ugo Tucci, Biringucci, Vannoccio, in DBI. Caboga was also member of the Confusi Academy in Viterbo.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
